context: Evaluates correct use of all five notebook Tauri commands: notebook_create, notebooks_list, notebook_get, notebook_update, and notebook_delete. Tests the full CRUD lifecycle including correct argument types and return value handling.

checklist.name: notebook_create usage
checklist.description: The solution calls `notebook_create` with a title string and returns the resulting `Notebook` object (which includes `id`, `title`, `parent_id`, `sort_order`, `created_at`, `updated_at`).

checklist.name: notebooks_list usage
checklist.description: The solution calls `notebooks_list` (no arguments) and returns the `Notebook[]` array.

checklist.name: notebook_get usage
checklist.description: The solution calls `notebook_get` with a UUID string and returns the single `Notebook` object.

checklist.name: notebook_update usage
checklist.description: The solution calls `notebook_update` with a full `Notebook` object (not just the id and title).

checklist.name: notebook_delete usage
checklist.description: The solution calls `notebook_delete` with a UUID string to remove the notebook.
